notes: SHIP v1.14.220 — 3D RACK FULL RENDER PARITY (per HANDOFF-3d-rack-render-parity.md, base .219). Brings the desktop 3D view up to the approved phone-mock quality; the trays looked like flat floating tiles because there was NO cabinet enclosure and no color pipeline. Additive scene-setup only in rackElevation_render3D (no app logic, no CSS/markup) + CACHE_VERSION bump. CHANGES: (1) RENDERER color pipeline — alpha:false + setClearColor(0x06090f) + scene.background + outputEncoding=sRGBEncoding + toneMapping=ACESFilmicToneMapping + exposure 1.05 (1.1 on wide viewports) → richer, consistent phone⇄monitor color. (2) LIGHTING rig set to the mock's EXACT positions: ambient 0x243040@1.05, key dir 0xbfe9ff@0.9 (7,12,9), violet rim 0x9b59ff@0.55 (-9,5,-7), cyan PointLight 0x5cf2ff@0.5 dist 60 (0,0,14) [0.6 on wide]. (3) ★ FULL CABINET ENCLOSURE (the main fix for 'floating tiles') — new frame() helper builds each steel-blue (0x11202b, metalness .62) frame piece WITH a thin cyan (0x5cf2ff@0.28) EdgesGeometry lit edge: 4 corner posts + top/bottom rails + side EIA mounting rails, PLUS a BACK PANEL (PlaneGeometry RW-.05×RH-.05, DoubleSide, at z=-RD/2+.03) with a faint cyan vent-slot grid — the back panel is the single most important piece; trays now sit against a surface instead of floating in the void. No opaque side panels (would hide trays when orbited). (4) TRAY inset widened to BoxGeometry(RW-0.34, h, RD-0.34) so trays sit INSIDE the frame (was RW-0.5); gap 0.06 kept. (5) GROUND disc radius 8 (locked). Materials unchanged from .219 (per-zone emissive MeshStandardMaterial: compute cyan / switch violet / power gold / cdu teal; never MeshBasicMaterial, never one shared material). Camera/dims unchanged (RW 6.0, RD 2.7, uH 0.34, FOV 32, fitDist frames full height; fitDist is height-based so it already scales to any aspect — the resize handler recomputes cam.aspect). All .219 interaction + all .218 lifecycle guards preserved (camera spherical orbit, MINI scrubber + highlight band, canvas.isConnected self-dispose, forceContextLoss teardown, single-context invariant). Enclosure geometries/materials (frame boxes, edge line-segments, back panel, vent grid) all live in rackGrp → disposed by the scene.traverse teardown. All r128 APIs verified present: sRGBEncoding, ACESFilmicToneMapping, PlaneGeometry, DoubleSide, EdgesGeometry, LineSegments, PointLight(color,intensity,distance). Gates: node --check sw.js + inline HTML blocks · CSS braces unchanged · CRLF · three.min.js present · three-stamp lockstep .219->.220. ROLLBACK: git revert — all additive scene-setup lines, restores the .219 build, no logic touched. DEVICE-VERIFY (both screens, hard stop): remove+re-add PWA, confirm v1.14.220, then: (1) DESKTOP — open 3D → deep black field, glowing multi-color rack sitting INSIDE a lit steel cabinet (corner posts + rails + back panel behind the trays + side EIA rails), NOT flat blue shelves floating on grey; (2) PHONE — open 3D → identical premium look to MOCKUP-rack-threejs.html; (3) side by side → same colors/glow/depth; (4) trays glow + vary by color (cyan compute / violet switch / gold power), not one flat blue; (5) all four lights read (violet rim edge glow + cyan front bloom); (6) orbit + pinch + MINI scrubber highlight band still work on both; (7) tap a tray → correct sheet; (8) ?legacy=1 untouched, FLAT still instant default; (9) no runaway loop / orphan GPU on toggle or nav-away (regression-check).
